title: Swing Speed Changer
description: This is a mod to override the default swing speed!
body:
So, this is a mod that lets you change the swing speed of your hand,to a value from 0 (fastest) to 100(slowest) 

# It currently crashes on 1.21.4+ versions (1.21.5, 1.21.6, ...)

## Config
The config screen is accessible from mod menu and also from a configurable keybind (Default: Y) (in 1.16.5 it is R_SHIFT idk why)
